case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. PAUL A WILLIAMS et al

CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT THE AMOUNT BEING HELD BY THE SHERIFF IS EXEMPT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 704.080. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
Appearances: Paul Williams (405.5352) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona; no other appearances.
Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: Granted. Defendant has shown that the amount being held by the Sheriff is exempt under Code of Civil Procedure 704.080. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
